reviews.comment:
Como pocas veces mala atención nada de productos y falta de mantenimiento. Solo para cargar combustible. Demás nada

(Translated by Google)
As is rarely the case, poor service, no products, and lack of maintenance. Only for fuel. Nothing else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeU82TkZBEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención al cliente es mala .. siempre le falta algo a garayalde si no es la NAFTA ,es el azúcar, no tienen comida para que uno pueda llevar y si tienen te arrancan la cabeza con los precios,te cobran el agua caliente,te atienden con cara de ojete los empleados 👎

(Translated by Google)
Customer service is terrible... Garayalde is always short on something; if it's not gasoline, it's sugar. They don't have food to take away, and if they do, the prices are outrageous. They charge for hot water, and the employees treat you with a sour face. 👎
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeU5hN3d3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Falta personal en época de turismo,a pesar del esfuerzo del personal siempre están sucios los sanitarios y la espera en el full es eterna pero bueno será demasiado pedir por la zona en que se encuentra, será hasta que alguien compita con ellos

(Translated by Google)
There is a lack of staff during the tourist season, despite the efforts of the staff, the toilets are always dirty and the wait at full capacity is eternal, but well, it will be too much to ask for in the area where it is located, until someone competes with them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMEt6ck5nEAE

reviews.comment:
No tenían casi nada de la lista de minutas. Nos fuimos sin comer.
La atención mediocre.
Una pena.

(Translated by Google)
They had almost nothing on the menu. We left without eating.
The service was mediocre.
A shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCa1BQRWRREAE

reviews.comment:
Cuesta comunicarse por WhatsApp, y los baños deberían estar más limpios ,dado la gran afluencia de público que tiene.

(Translated by Google)
It's difficult to communicate via WhatsApp, and the bathrooms should be cleaner, given the large influx of people.
